SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-02-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WEST, TODD IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PATELCO CREDIT UNION CERTEGY PAYMENT RECOVERY SERVICES, INC. THE JUDGMENT IS A DECISION AS TO THE LIABILITY OF THE NAMED DEFENDANTS ONLY, AND DOES NOT AFFECT ANY CLAIM PLAINTIFF MAY HAVE AGAINST EBAY, PAYPAL, OR THE SELLER. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
